REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (120 Manor Drive, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Sep-10-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Lawrence Syracusa appearing for and with Daniel Cunningham.
The Court found that matter was procedurally in order. The bid was increased to $819,500.00 . An additional bond of $570,000.00 is required. Counsel will submit bond with order.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Janet Pond CSR#5292. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. Clerk: Rosie Noguera

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-20-2007 Continued To Sep-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Continued To Jun-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Lawrence Siracusa appearing for petitioner. Charles Kuntz appearing for objector Eric Shiraishi. Charles MacGuire appearing for Faye Sugrue. Ed Koplowitz is not in court. He has informed Mr. Siracusa that he is not available this morning. The proposal is to appoint a special administrator. Mr. Siracusa will file an exparte petition for appointment of a special administrator next week. Parties are agreeable to mediation. They are trying to work things out. Court is referring this matter to the Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 6/18. Matter is continued to 6/20 for status. Mr. Kuntz will apply for issuance of summons if they can not settle.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Continued To Apr-18-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Lawrence Siracusa appearing for Daniel Cunningham. Elizabeth Mackenzie appearing for objector. Both counsel agreed to a continuance. Matter is continued to 4/18.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Loos.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Continued To Mar-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
